raw_consumer_statement: We were auto paying our cable bill. Everything was fine until they started emailing our statement without notification. We missed XXXX payments. I found out that we were late, I made a payment on XXXX XXXX over the phone for {$100.00} then another {$250.00} on XXXX XXXX XXXX over the phone. I asked them will they go ahead and pay the cable company. They said no, the cable company will have to resubmit the charge. On XXXX XXXX, XXXX I had the cable company run the card again so they will send them my payment. They paid my bill {$340.00} and billed me again the {$340.00} because the cable company run my card again. I put in a dispute and in XXXX XXXX they pulled my payment back from my cable company. The cable company called and advised me that I need to pay them {$340.00} because my credit card company did a charge back. I went and paid my cable bill {$340.00}. Now I have paid {$680.00}. for XXXX months cable. My cable is {$160.00} a month. The credit card company has my {$340.00} and they say I owe them another {$340.00}. Then they said my credit card was charged twice on XXXX, but can not provide me a statement showing the XXXX charges. I spoke with their fraud department and they don't see XXXX charges on XXXX either, I called my cable company and they don't see XXXX charges. My credit card company hasn't actually paid my cable company since XX/XX/XXXX. My cable bill is paid up to end of XXXX because I took them on auto pay in XXXX. Please help me. You can pull my payment history and have paid my bills on time and in full.
